channel.title: BYOI on Code Before Breach
channel.description: Recent content in BYOI on Code Before Breach

item.title: Endpoint Evasion Techniques (2020–2025): The Evolution of Attacks Bypassing EDR
item.description: Five years of EDR evasion techniques—BYOI, BYOVD, DLL hijacking, and service tampering—with real ransomware case studies.
